summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ProfileVerify dating profile verification app. All major features working correctly including AI-powered analysis, user authentication, and bilingual support.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: Minor - error handling works but status code inconsistent
